summary: Cardiff Lexington Corporation is a Nevada corporation operating as a diversified holding company that acquires and operates businesses across multiple sectors. The company focuses on identifying, acquiring, integrating, and operating businesses, aiming to maintain profitability and improve capital efficiency. Specific products and services of its consolidated subsidiaries are not detailed in this excerpt of the filing.
